title: Demo Time Gallery Index Entry
description: Schema for a summary entry in the Demo Time Gallery index

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for this document.

id.description: Unique identifier for the snippet. Must match the file path relative to the gallery/ folder, without the .json extension (e.g. 'setup/presentation-mode').

description.description: A clear explanation of what the snippet does and when to use it.
examples: Prepares VS Code for presenting by enabling Caffeine, hiding the menubar, and entering full screen.

author.description: Display name of the snippet author.

tags.description: List of tags used for filtering in the gallery panel.

fields.description: Summary of the arguments the snippet accepts. Each field maps to a {PLACEHOLDER} used in the snippet's steps.

name.description: The placeholder name as used in steps, written in UPPER_SNAKE_CASE.

description.description: A short explanation of what value this field expects.
examples: Relative path to the file to insert content into

type.description: The expected value type for this field.

required.description: Whether this field must be provided by the user.

default.description: Default value used when the user does not provide one. Only allowed when required is false.

path.description: Relative path to the full snippet JSON file within the gallery.

actions.description: List of Demo Time action types used by this snippet.
